# FRiNGE

> FRiNGE is a Living Globe of real-time vibes. Real people on the ground capture fresh signals from beaches, cities, and adventure spots around the world. No uploads, no edits, no filters.

## Pages

- [Home](/): The Living Globe and an intro to how FRiNGE works.
- [Signal Regions](/signal-regions): Browse every region broadcasting on FRiNGE.
- [For Vibers](/vibers): How people on the ground capture vibes and earn.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Founding Member Pass — $100 one-time, limited to 2,000 seats.
- [Boracay](/regions/boracay): Live region page for Boracay.
- [Rio](/regions/rio): Live region page for Rio.
- [Hood River](/regions/hood-river): Live region page for Hood River.

## Optional

- [Privacy Notice](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Refund Policy](/refunds)
